{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240126524AB3E95A6F1A5C440982"}"},"total":226},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7009897962533307151","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文学来讲，故事结构紧凑，故事情节很完整，有伏笔，起承转合很不错，小编加油！我看了一下楼上的评论，可能他们连什么记叙文什么叫议论文都分不清，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1632119057,"group_id":"6993527286611840013","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢抽风的作家，偶尔让你感受到猛男落泪","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3zAQiVRcX6rxEOsXABnMr8eUoS2i84dQTVpBXo0JAPW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"4085412678081118","user_name":"后来呀我喜欢一个人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4085412678081118","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6993527286611840013","book_info":{"abstract":"帝辛穿越封神，觉醒系统，只要咸鱼就有奖励。
皇后寝宫睡到日上三竿，获得奖励。
御花园酒池肉林摸鱼烧烤，获得奖励。
……
突然一日，商容进言，要女娲宫降香。
帝辛当即脸就黑了。
“女娲宫降香？”
“傻子才去！去了被西方二圣算计，得罪女娲吗？”
“到时妲己入朝歌，孤快活得很，第一个死的就是你们这群大臣。”
